victim.value: A girl with green eyes full of deep sadness, possibly deceased

closed_world.value: Echo's Hill - a house preceded by a gated pathway with trees

investigator.value: First-person narrator experiencing recurring dreams, seeking hypnotherapy for answers
investigator.quote: I had been having them for around a month now, and they had gotten progressively longer and more vivid.

red_herring.value: Dreams presented as supernatural/mystical experience when likely psychological trauma manifestation
red_herring.quote: (My place of death) Which is weird, b[...] someone is standing right next to me, whispering the words into my ear

clue_fairness.value: Dream details progressively revealed to reader as narrator remembers more each night
clue_fairness.quote: I began to remember more and more. Eventually I got to the point where I could remember it well enough to write

social_world.value: Domestic middle-class family structure with professional therapy/medical establishment
social_world.quote: My wife had her job to get to. My son was preparing for his finals week

reveal_mechanic.value: Hypnotherapy session scheduled to unlock dream meaning and reveal truth
reveal_mechanic.quote: I felt like I was about to be rid of the dream that plagued me so, like I was about to find out what it meant

investigator_wound.value: Recurring traumatic dreams disrupting sleep and family life, compelling obsessive investigation
investigator_wound.quote: Maybe it was the embarrassment of waking her up every night

_meta.title: ebook confusedalarms scenes from a memory
